title: Glass Kitchen Preservation Storage Food Jar With Airtight Screw Top Metal Lid (1, 500ml)
description: Product Description Affordable Everyday Living Here at Queensway Home & Dining we strive to bring customers High Quality Everyday Products at affordable prices. We source the best materials for our products and have them manufacturer with the everyday consumer in mind. High Quality Affordable Simple Kitchen Glass Preservation Storage Food Jar With Airtight Screw Top Metal Lid The Pasabahce glass jars are an excellent choice for storing a variety of products, including foods, drinks, and other items. These jars made of glass are the ideal containers for storing a variety of items, including biscuits, preserves, nuts, and juice. During the process of preserving, these jars are constructed from sturdy glass and have metal lids that produce a tight vacuum seal. This ensures that your food will remain well-preserved and will not go bad. Durable Glass Brand: Pasabahce Airtight Seal 5 sizes: 300ml, 500ml, 1L, 1.5L, 3L and 5L Dimensions per Jar (HxWxD): 300ml- 8.5x 9 X 9, 500ml- 11.3x 9 X 9, 1l- 17x 10 X 10, 1.5l- 19x 11 X 11, 3l- 25.1x13.5x13.5cm, 5l- 29.2x 15 X 15 Single Homemade Storage Jar These jars are not only excellent for pickling foods, but they are also the ideal containers for storing all of your favourite delicacies. Long-lasting glass that has a leak-proof seal. These stylish jars come with a sophisticated gold lid that adds character and elegance to the glass jar, allowing it to mix in with your other food accessories. 5 sizes: 300ml, 500ml, 1L, 1.5L, 3L and 5L You can choose from a variety of sizes to find the perfect fit for your cooking needs. You are able to reach those cookies that are at the bottom of the jars since the necks of the jars are wide enough to accommodate your hand.
